goal_text:
You are looking for information in Cambridge.
You are looking for places to go in town. The attraction should be in the 'centre'.
Make sure you get 'address' and 'phone number'.
You are also looking for a 'train'. The train should 'leave after 17:15' and should depart from 'london liverpool street'.
The train should leave on 'saturday' and should go to 'cambridge'.
Make sure you get 'travel time' and 'train ID'.Remember. You don't want booking for train. Just get the information and it all done.

message: You are looking for information in Cambridge
You are looking for places to go in town. The attraction should be in the centre
Make sure you get address and phone number
You are also looking for a train. The train should leave after 17:15 and should depart from london liverpool street
The train should leave on saturday and should go to cambridge
Make sure you get travel time and train ID
